text:

Please contect  

> host -t ns de.freebsd.org 
de.freebsd.org name server ns.cs.tu-berlin.de. 
de.freebsd.org name server baerenklau.de.freebsd.org. 

> dig @baerenklau.de.freebsd.org de.freebsd.org SOA | awk '/^de.freebsd.org.*SOA/ { sub(/./, "@", $6); print $6 }' 
hostmaster@de.freebsd.org. 

for this.
